title: Smoky Peruvian Chicken Wrap
description: A smoky and cheesy Peruvian chicken dish featuring stracciatella cheese, shio cure, and anti inflammatory friendly ingredients, all wrapped in a lotus leaf wrap.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together smoked paprika, garlic powder, turmeric, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken strips to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the spice mixture.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium high heat and cook the chicken for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
In a small bowl, mix together the shio cure and water.
Brush the shio cure mixture onto the cooked chicken.
Warm the lotus leaf wraps by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the wraps by placing a portion of the chicken onto a lotus leaf wrap, topping with shredded stracciatella cheese.
Fold the bottom half of the wrap up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the wrap up tightly.
